title: chore: remove 4 dead apps (2026-06-08)
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
## Dead App Removal

These apps returned 404/410 in **all 3 check rounds** (5 min apart):

- WorkFlow | https://unjustifiable-pedicellar-nadia.ngrok-free.dev/workflow/oWorRAl4sY41omgW
- Christmas Postcard Creator | https://christmas-card-creator.up.railway.app/
- Lapse Game 2075 | https://makeypocket.github.io/LapseGame/
- Player or AI [Roblox] | https://www.roblox.com/games/95217169945642/Player-or-AI

Review before merging. Close this PR to keep all apps.

gist.headline: Pruning the garden
gist.blurb: Our automated bot did some light gardening, removing a few community apps that have gone offline to keep the showcase fresh.
gist.summary: Automated cleanup removed four offline community apps (WorkFlow, Christmas Postcard Creator, Lapse Game 2075, and Player or AI) from the showcase after they consistently returned 404 errors.
gist.impact: The community showcase remains clean and functional, ensuring users only discover active, working projects.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Nomnom creature doing some garden cleanup. Nomnom eating dead leaves/broken links to represent removing 404s.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, sweeping up brown pixelated leaves while the round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a broken link icon. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
